items.title: Zelenskyy replaces top Ukraine general in biggest military shake-up since 2024
items.description: President chooses 43-year-old Mykhailo Drapatyi to replace Oleksandr Syrsky in generational shift in Kyiv’s military leadership

items.title: Bill Gates was warned about Epstein links by staff of his foundation
items.description: Independent review finds talks with late sex offender continued for more than three years despite concerns

items.title: Should testosterone be in Hegseth’s build-your-own-warrior playbook?
items.description: The US administration sees scientific evidence as an optional, flexible handmaid to the more vital business of masculinity

items.title: Shares in UK defence groups rise on hopes Healey will boost military spending
items.description: New chancellor backed by investors to find cash he previously said was required to keep country safe

items.description: Move by Özgür Özel could threaten longtime Turkish leader at next election scheduled for 2028

items.title: Burnham backs away from costly increase to income tax allowance
items.description: New prime minister had explored raising £12,570 personal allowance before taking office on Monday

items.title: Why the world trusts China more than America
items.description: Countries suspicious of the US are to be found on every continent, not just in its own back yard

items.title: The Gulf nation that became Iran’s softest target
items.description: Kuwait, still scarred by the 1990 Iraqi invasion, has been repeatedly attacked by Tehran and its allies
